name: Impossible Bacon Breakfast Pie (Quiche)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the bacon and drain it well.
2. Crumble the cooked bacon into the dish.
3. Add onion and sprinkle with cheese.
4. In a blender, mix together remaining ingredients for 1 minute.
5. Pour the mixture over the top of the bacon in the greased dish.
6. Bake at 350°F until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean (35-45 minutes).
